item.title: Native Java Bytecode Debugging without Source Code - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Native Java bytecode debugging without source code explained on the CrowdStrike blog, click to learn more & read other top cybersecurity news!

item.title: Mo' Shells Mo' Problems - Deep Panda Web Shells - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Part one covering Deep Panda web shells and the case study of the incident response investigation conducted to identify them on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Mo' Shells Mo' Problems - File List Stacking - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Part two covering Deep Panda web shells and the case study of the incident response investigation conducted to identify them on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: *NEW* Community Tool: CrowdResponse
item.description: The New Community Tools initial version provides three useful build-in-modules. CrowdStrike has an exciting collection of new modules planned. Learn more!

item.title: Mo' Shells Mo' Problems - Web Server Log Analysis - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Part four covering Deep Panda web shells and the case study of the incident response investigation conducted to identify them on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Mo' Shells Mo' Problems - Network Detection - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Part three covering Deep Panda web shells and the case study of the incident response investigation conducted to identify them on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: CrowdStrike Tracks Reported Iranian Actor as FLYING KITTEN
item.description: Cat Scratch Fever: CrowdStrike Tracks Newly Reported Iranian Actor as FLYING KITTEN. Learn more now about how CrowdStrike was able to make this happen!

item.title: Read Featured Article by Chad Tilbury & Justin Weissert
item.description: Learn about the three new CrowdResponse modules, Drivers, Handles, and Strings, and how these modules focus on memory analysis on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Read Featured Research & Threat Intel Article by Adam Meyers
item.description: On Friday May 30, 2014, an unprecedented botnet disruption was initiated by the United States Department of Justice. Learn more about this today!

item.title: Registry Analysis with CrowdResponse - crowdstrike.com
item.description: With the third release of the free CrowdResponse tool available see a demonstration of how to identify Window Sticky Keys attacks!

item.title: Occupy Central: The Umbrella Revolution and Chinese Intelligence - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Occupy Central: A threat that made it a target for cyber attacks & how they were attacked. More information on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Mitigating the Bash (ShellShock) Vulnerability - CrowdStrike
item.description: Learn what steps to take to mitigate the threat of the Bash (ShellShock) Vulnerability. CrowdStrike walks through the ShellShock script vulnerability, its impact, recommendations for mitigation and more.

item.title: The Adversary Manifesto | Global Threat Intelligence
item.description: Adam Meyers, VP of Intelligence for Crowdstrike runs the team that creates actionable intelligence reports. Read about his approach to cyber security here!

item.title: How cybercrime and cybersecurity affects nations and geopolitics - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Learn how cybercrime & cybersecurity affects nations & geopolitics with a Q&A from CrowdStrike & The Adversary Manifesto! Click here to learn more!

item.title: Peering Around the Corner With Threat Intelligence - CrowdStrike
item.description: Understanding the culture of your adversaries can play a better role in combating against attacks. Learn how threat intelligence is utilized to drive decisions such as what defensive measures should be taken, what contingencies should be considered, and to do if a breach occurs.

item.title: Read Featured Executive Viewpoint Article by George Kurtz
item.description: CrowdStrike launches in stealth-mode with $26 million Series A round led b Warburg Pincus.

item.title: CrowdStrike Intelligence - Adversary-based Approach - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Having spent the better part of the last 10 years dealing with various cyber adversaries. Learn what companies have been doing to counter these attacks.

item.title: Unpacking Dynamically Allocated Code - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Most malware is obfuscated to make it more difficult for traditional antivirus engines to detect, here we discuss a non-manual method to unpack malware.

item.title: HTTP iframe Injecting Linux Rootkit - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Learn about the HTTP iframe injecting Linux Rootkit discovered in 2012 with CrowdStrike & their personal findings on this threat.

item.title: Free Community Tool: CrowdInspect
item.description: CrowdInspect is a free community tool for Microsoft Windows systems from CrowdStrike aimed to help alert you to potential malware. Learn more!

item.title: Anchor Panda | Threat Actor Profile | CrowdStrike
item.description: Anchor Panda is a China-based group of hackers that target civilian and military maritime operations. Learn about their aliases, targets, methods, more.

item.title: Read Featured Article "Whois Numbered Panda" by Adam Meyers
item.description: Learn with CrowdStrike as they discuss Chinese-based hackers & how there are multiple groups with different tactics, techniques, & practices!

item.title: Clever Kitten | Threat Actor Profile | CrowdStrike
item.description: Clever Kitten is an Iran-based group of hackers that primarily target global companies with strategic importance to countries that are contrary to Iranian interests.

item.title: Samurai Panda | Threat Actor Profile | CrowdStrike
item.description: Operation since 2009, Samurai Panda is a China-based criminal organization that use malware to target various industries across the Asian-Pacific.

item.title: DNS - The Lifeblood of your Domain - crowdstrike.com
item.description: As the situation on the ground in Syria continues to deteriorate, the Syrian Electronic Army (SEA) has made quite a few waves. Learn more on the situation!

item.title: VICEROY TIGER Delivers New Zero-Day Exploit - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Learn more about how VICEROY TIGER delivers new zero-day exploit & other breaking cybersecurity news here on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Analysis of a CVE-2013-3906 Exploit - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Many of CrowdStrike’s customers are often targeted by email phishing campaigns and strategic web compromises. Learn more about these attacks.

item.title: The Evolution of Protected Processes Part 2 - CrowdStrike
item.description: Learn how Windows protected process light guards critical system processes against modification. CrowdStrike also covers how services can now be configured to run as a PPL, and how the PPL concept brings yet another twist to the unkillable process argument and semantics.

item.title: Protected Processes Part 3: Windows PKI Internals
item.description: Protected Processes in Windows 8.1 Part Three: Taking a look at cryptographic security and how it protects a system. Click to read more!

item.title: Through the Window: Creative Code Invocation - crowdstrike.com
item.description: While analyzing a targeted attack, CrowdStrike observed an interesting code invocation technique that we want to describe here on our blog, click to read.
